entities.name: Design System
observations: Uses strict 8px grid layout spacing.
Relies on modern typography from Google Fonts: Outfit (headings) and Inter (body).
Theme default is high-contrast premium Dark Mode; Light Mode available via toggles.
Employs 12px border radius for content cards, 8px for form inputs, 999px for status badges.
Restricted transition animations: 200ms for micro-interactions, 300ms for page routing.

entities.name: UX Philosophy
observations: Core rule: Can a non-technical business owner perform this task in under 60 seconds?
Zero learning curve: Every blank state includes a clear CTA button.
One tap navigation: Always back to Dashboard via logo, with sidebar/tab bar sticky.
Instant feedback: Responsive skeleton screens for loading, slide-in top success/error toast alerts.
Forgiveness design: Mutating actions have a 5-second instant undo option, data goes to Archive.

entities.name: Master UX Index
observations: Single source of truth located at docs/design/MASTER_UX_INDEX.md.
Maps all 25 screens across Marketing, Portal, Compliance, Web, and Phase 2 agent specifications.

entities.name: Mega Admin Panel
observations: Unified backoffice console supporting roles for CEO, CTO, IT Admin, Engineer, and Sales.
Permits direct system prompt overrides tuning, VPS scaling triggers, and Stripe billing logs monitoring.

entities.name: Marketing Website
observations: Public marketing pages routed in Django templates under root.
Contains Homepage Landing page showcasing core Compliant AI employees.
Contains /agents catalog containing interactive category department chips and status indicator dots.
Contains /pricing Stripe-wired plan matrix (Free BDT 0, Growth BDT 5,000, Enterprise).
Includes /login and /signup django-allauth federated auth gates.

entities.name: Client Portal Console
observations: Main user interface accessible at /dashboard path.
Uses responsive split sidebar layout with contextual upper navigation bar.
Features multi-tenant organization dropdown switcher mapping active company schemas.
Aggregates total running agents, compliance watchdog health percentage, and live activity feeds.

entities.name: Veritas Onboarding
observations: Client identity verification module accessible at /dashboard/veritas.
Structured as a 3-step wizard (Business registration details -> PDF Document Dropzone -> Verification).
Triggers OCR compliance indexing parser on document attachment.

entities.name: Inspector Watchdog
observations: Real-time middleware auditing 40+ global regulations including GDPR, HIPAA, and EU AI Act.
Pre-execution interceptor on all non-GET mutating actions.
Automatically redacts PII and logs audit tracks to django db.

entities.name: Voice Receptionist Panel
observations: Sub-dashboard dedicated to managing virtual phone receptionists.
Visualizes Twilio virtual phone numbers and call volume tracking charts.
Includes right-anchored full transcription drawer displaying AI call summary logs.

entities.name: Serea Campaign Console
observations: Sub-panel managing copywriter campaigns and scheduled blogs.
Contains inline editing widgets for draft modifications, A/B optimization trigger buttons.

entities.name: Web Approvals Feed
observations: Web screen built on Django templates with action buttons.
Allows user to approve or reject compliance alerts via button clicks.
Maintains database synchronization via Django SSE and connectivity warnings.

entities.name: Lead Hunter Dashboard
observations: Outreach sequencer panel matching search terms with target company leads.
Monitors lead reply rates, trigger automations and coordinates with Serea briefs.

entities.name: Content Architect Dashboard
observations: SEO strategic outline brief creator.
Manages search vol indices, position indicators, and keyword difficulties.

entities.name: Aria Support Console
observations: Customer helpdesk interface and escalation queue controller.

entities.name: Kai DevOps Console
observations: System performance visualizer plotting memory meters, Docker toggles, and live audit warnings.

entities.name: Hera HR Panel
observations: Leave requests queue and employee onboarding contractor checklister.

entities.name: Nova Data Analyst Dashboard
observations: Natural-language query compiler generating structured database SQL statements and line plots.
